title: Donut Helper
description:
Simple  Mod to help  you enhance your donutsmp selling / farming grind.
The mod  offers a good amount of options for notes and payment monitoring
body:
Welcome to DonutHelper.

**What we offer?**

**Gambling Tracking**
With 1 flick of a button you can turn on gambling mode. Gambling mode will monitor all your current payment's going in and out. After your done with gambling, It auto checks how much you lost and made. Then the total vaule.

**Order Tracking**
Write Down How much you bought and then sold for. This could be any item. After the note is put on the menu it will INSANTLY, give you how much profit you made.

**Player lookup**
Lookup Any user on donutsmp using your api key, You will be able to Search for there stats + if there in the end,nether,overworld.

**Next update's coming.** 
Auction Lookup Leaderboard Watcher. And more soon.

Any other questions or something you want to see added on dm **mcdevs** on discord
